title: Fusifilum gracile
taxonomy: Fusifilum gracile is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae, and more specifically within the subfamily Scilloideae. This plant is native to southern Africa and is known for its slender, tubular flowers. Fusifilum gracile is a member of the genus Fusifilum, which is closely related to other genera in the family Asparagaceae. Within the genus Fusifilum, F. gracile is often distinguished by its unique flower shape and slender stem. The classification of F. gracile is further supported by its genetic and morphological characteristics.
